summary: Iteration 55: Complete testing of PDF generation and email sending workflow for RdP and OdA. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components working correctly. Fixed critical React hooks ordering bug in CommessaOpsPanel.js.

rdp_pdf_generation.create_rdp_with_line_items: PASS - RdP with 3 lines (Trave IPE 200, Lamiera, Bulloneria) including Cert. 3.1 flags
rdp_pdf_generation.get_rdp_pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF (application/pdf, Content-Disposition: inline)

oda_pdf_generation.get_oda_pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF with total amount

email_sending.send_rdp_email_without_supplier_email: PASS - Returns 400 with helpful error message when no email configured
email_sending.send_rdp_email_with_supplier_email: PASS - Email sent (or 500 if Resend not configured)
email_sending.send_oda_email_with_supplier_email: PASS - Email sent and email_sent status tracked

pdf_content_validation.rdp_pdf_contains_cert_badge: PASS - PDF generated for items with Cert. 3.1 requirement

commessa_ops_panel.approvvigionamento_section: PASS - Shows 4 items badge, RdP/OdA entries visible
commessa_ops_panel.rdp_bozza_badge: PASS - Red 'Bozza' badge displayed for email_sent=false
commessa_ops_panel.rdp_inviata_badge: PASS - Green 'Inviata' badge displayed for email_sent=true
commessa_ops_panel.oda_bozza_badge: PASS - Red 'Bozza' badge displayed for draft orders
commessa_ops_panel.oda_inviata_badge: PASS - Green 'Inviata' badge displayed for sent orders
commessa_ops_panel.pdf_preview_buttons: PASS - 4 PDF preview buttons found (FileSearch icons)

pdf_preview_dialog.dialog_opens: PASS - Click on PDF preview button opens modal dialog
pdf_preview_dialog.dialog_description: PASS - Shows 'Verifica il documento prima di inviarlo via email'
pdf_preview_dialog.pdf_iframe: PASS - PDF Preview iframe present for inline PDF viewing
pdf_preview_dialog.send_email_button: PASS - 'Invia Email' button present in dialog footer

rdp_dialog.line_items_table: PASS - Columns: Descrizione, Quantità, U.M., Cert. 3.1

oda_dialog.line_items_table_with_pricing: PASS - Columns: Descrizione, Quantità, U.M., Prezzo Unit. €, Importo €, 3.1
oda_dialog.price_input: PASS - Prezzo Unitario input accepts decimal values
oda_dialog.total_display: PASS - 'Totale Ordine: X,XX €' updates in real-time

bugs_fixed.issue: React Hook 'useState' is called conditionally - hooks (pdfPreviewUrl, pdfPreviewTitle, sendingEmail) were declared after an early return statement on line 111
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved useState hooks for PDF preview/email sending states to the top of the component, before any conditional returns
bugs_fixed.impact: CRITICAL - Fixed runtime error that broke the entire CommessaOpsPanel component rendering

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation uses WeasyPrint with shared template utilities (pdf_template.py)
Email service supports Resend API - returns helpful error when not configured
email_sent, email_sent_to, email_sent_at fields tracked on RdP/OdA entries
PDF preview uses iframe with inline content disposition for browser viewing
Status badges correctly differentiate draft (red 'Bozza') vs sent (green 'Inviata')

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all dialog features and status badges working)

test_credentials: Dynamic test sessions created per test run (ui-pdfemail-*, test-pdf-email-*)
seed_data_creation: Test commesse with RdP/OdA entries created with both email_sent=true and email_sent=false states to verify badge display
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation and email sending workflow fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/commesse/{id}/approvvigionamento/richieste/{rdp_id}/pdf, GET /api/commesse/{id}/approvvigionamento/ordini/{ordine_id}/pdf, POST .../send-email. Frontend has PDF preview dialog with iframe and 'Invia Email' button. Status badges show 'Bozza' (red) or 'Inviata' (green) based on email_sent boolean field.
